creator: gorlov.a@gmail.com
text:
HP DL180 G6 can't boot sometimes with messages:
ciss0: completed invalid request 15704 (0x9a021)
run_interrupt_driven_hooks: still waiting after 60 seconds for xpt_config 
...

all firmware is already up to date
